title: Curriculum Vitae
subtitle: Interdisciplinary researcher and engineer working across AI4Science, intelligent laboratory systems, XR, computer vision, and human-centred computing.

entries.title: Chief AI Architect
entries.organization: EC-ZERO Lab, Global Institute of Future Technology, Shanghai Jiao Tong University

items.label: AI4Science Architecture
items.description: Designing AI-assisted research workflows for electrochemical systems, intelligent electrolysis, and green energy research.

items.label: Research Toolchains
items.description: Building data, model, and knowledge-management workflows for scientific collaboration and laboratory operations.

items.label: Intelligent Laboratory Systems
items.description: Leading LabOS concepts, experiment workflow support, asset tracking, and AI-assisted research infrastructure.

entries.title: Engineer / Director of XR Lab
entries.organization: Student Innovation Center, Shanghai Jiao Tong University

items.label: Curriculum Design
items.description: Co-chaired the SJTU AIGC Class and developed generative AI, XR, Python, computer vision, and engineering practice modules.

items.label: Lab Management
items.description: Directed the XR Lab and supported equipment procurement, prototyping workflows, and student innovation training.

items.label: Student Mentorship
items.description: Mentored 50+ student teams across courses, innovation programmes, and national competitions, supporting multiple award-winning interdisciplinary projects.

items.label: 3D Visualisation
items.description: Worked on large-scale 3D city and LiDAR data visualisation systems.

items.label: System Design
items.description: Designed and implemented interactive interfaces for energy research and data-driven visual analytics projects.

entries.title: Northwest University
